overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game (Starfield) showing a character entering a futuristic medical clinic. The character approaches a reception desk where two NPCs are present, pauses briefly, then turns and walks toward an exit door. The environment features teal-colored walls, white tiled flooring, and high-tech medical equipment with distinctive posters on the walls.

events.description: character slows and stops briefly at the reception desk

agents.ego_description: approaching the reception desk in a futuristic medical facility, moving past the glass partition

notable_agents.action: seated receptionist working at the desk computer
standing woman conversing with the receptionist at the counter

entered.detail: futuristic poster with face and 'Enhance!' text referencing Blade Runner, mounted on the left wall
curved white reception counter with computer terminals and medical equipment
transparent glass barrier with metal frame separating the walkway
tall white storage cabinets against the right wall of the reception area

segments.scene_description: The character walks forward into a futuristic medical clinic reception area with teal walls and white tiled floors. A distinctive 'Enhance!' poster is visible on the left wall as the character approaches a curved reception desk where a seated receptionist and a standing woman are positioned behind glass partitions.

events.description: character turns right and begins walking toward the exit doors

agents.ego_description: turning right away from the reception desk and walking toward the exit doors to leave the clinic

entered.detail: blue and green abstract art poster with geometric patterns on the left wall
double doors with yellow diagonal warning stripes and illuminated red exit sign above
tall water dispenser unit near the left wall
digital screen mounted on the wall displaying data readouts
tan leather armchair in the corner near the exit doors

segments.scene_description: The character turns right and moves away from the reception area toward a set of exit doors marked with yellow warning stripes and a red exit sign. The corridor features an abstract poster on the left wall, a water cooler, and a tan armchair near the exit as the character approaches the doors to leave the facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic medical clinic that transitions from a busy reception area to a quiet exit corridor. It begins as the character walks across white tiled floors toward a curved reception desk, passing a distinctive Enhance! poster on the teal walls while approaching a receptionist and a standing woman behind glass partitions. As the character reaches the desk, the camera pivots right and moves away from the reception hub, shifting the focus toward the facility's perimeter. The scene then opens into a corridor featuring an abstract poster and a water cooler, passing a tan armchair before finally turning toward exit doors marked with yellow warning stripes and a red sign.
